title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.709 - Application, contents
text:
301.709.  Application, contents. — Application for registration shall be made to the department of revenue on a form as the director shall prescribe, which shall contain a complete description of the all-terrain vehicle, including the manufacturer's identification number and the name and address of the owner of the all-terrain vehicle.
(L. 1988 H.B. 990 § 6) 
Effective 1-01-89
